description: Manage the youth soccer carpool schedule in /home/ga/Documents/carpool_schedule.xlsx after a family drops out. Fill coverage gaps, verify vehicle capacity constraints, calculate gas cost reimbursements, and apply conditional formatting. Save the final spreadsheet to /home/ga/Documents/carpool_results.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: The Martinez family has dropped out of the soccer carpool. Reassign their 6 driving dates to other families, ensuring vehicle capacity limits are respected. Apply conditional formatting to highlight capacity issues. Calculate fair gas reimbursement based on miles driven (total budget: $240).
